name: dataiku-plugin-developer
description: Skills and checks for building professional Dataiku DSS plugins, with strong support for webapp components.

interface.shortDescription: Build, review, and package professional Dataiku DSS plugins.
interface.longDescription: A focused Codex plugin for creating Dataiku DSS plugins, especially webapp plugins, with official workflow guidance, best-practice checks, and a local verifier script.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a Dataiku DSS webapp plugin in this repo.
Review this Dataiku plugin for upload readiness.
Add a code env and packaging checklist to this plugin.
